title: Jazz Night in the Lounge
subtitle: Smooth live jazz with signature drinks
hint: Show this code at the entrance during the event
description: Settle into a cosy armchair and enjoy an evening of live jazz in our lounge bar. A rotating line-up of talented musicians creates a warm, intimate atmosphere with smooth tunes and relaxed vibes — perfect after a long day.
entryPrice:
Entry: complimentary for hotel guests
Drinks and snacks charged separately
extras: Table service available throughout the show
Recommended to arrive 10–15 minutes early for the best seats

title: Comedy Evening
subtitle: Stand-up sets from local and guest comedians
hint: Show this code at the entrance during the event
description: A night of laughs with rotating comedians. Relaxed seating, craft cocktails, and a warm atmosphere make it an easy go-to for an evening out.
extras: Table service available during the show
Arrive 10 minutes early for best seats

title: Aqua Relax Session
subtitle: Guided hydrotherapy with aroma infusions
hint: Show this code at the entrance during the event
description: Unwind with a curated hydrotherapy circuit, aroma infusions, and calming music. Ideal for recovery or a reset day.

title: Signature Massage Ritual
subtitle: Deep relaxation with warm oils and calming music
hint: Show this code at the spa reception
description: A 50-minute full-body massage with warm oils, gentle stretching, and aromatherapy to melt away tension.
extras: Herbal tea and fruit offered post-treatment

title: Morning Yoga Flow
subtitle: Vinyasa-inspired session to start your day
hint: Show this code at the studio entrance
description: Gentle vinyasa flow focused on mobility, breath, and light strength. Suitable for all levels.

title: Strength Circuit
subtitle: Coach-led small group training
hint: Show this code at the gym reception
description: A fast-paced circuit combining free weights, cardio intervals, and mobility work. Limited spots for personal attention.

title: Coastal Vineyard Walk
subtitle: Scenic trail with guided tasting
hint: Show this code at the tour desk
description: A relaxed coastal walk through nearby vineyards with a hosted tasting at sunset.

title: Bike & Explore Package
subtitle: Guided ride with coastal viewpoints
hint: Show this code when collecting your bike
description: Guided bike tour covering city highlights and coastal viewpoints. Pace adjusted to the group.

title: Mediterranean Cooking Class
subtitle: Hands-on session with our chef
hint: Show this code at the kitchen studio
description: Learn to craft Mediterranean favorites with our chef. Includes tasting and recipe cards.

title: Wine Tasting Workshop
subtitle: Discover local vintages with a sommelier
hint: Show this code at the tasting room
description: Taste and learn about regional wines with our sommelier. Paired with cheeses and chocolates.
